sentences.target: Meine Familie kommt heute zu Besuch.

translations.de: Meine Familie kommt heute zu Besuch.
translations.en: My family is coming to visit today.
translations.es: Mi familia viene a visitarme hoy.
translations.fr: Ma famille vient me rendre visite aujourd'hui.
translations.it: La mia famiglia viene a trovarmi oggi.
translations.ko: 오늘 우리 가족이 나를 보러 와요.
translations.ru: Моя семья сегодня придёт ко мне.
translations.pt: Minha família vem me visitar hoje.
translations.he: המשפחה שלי באה לבקר אותי היום.
translations.vi: Gia đình tôi đến thăm tôi hôm nay.
translations.nl: Mijn familie komt vandaag op bezoek.
translations.uk: Моя сім'я сьогодні прийде до мене.
translations.hi: आज मेरा परिवार मुझसे मिलने आ रहा है.
translations.el: Η οικογένειά μου έρχεται να με επισκεφτεί σήμερα.
translations.nb: Familien min kommer på besøk i dag.
translations.id: Keluarga saya datang berkunjung hari ini.
translations.sv: Min familj kommer på besök idag.
translations.ro: Familia mea vine să mă viziteze astăzi.
translations.da: Min familie kommer på besøg i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は家族が会いに来ます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Familie'; nominative feminine singular, marking ownership.
Common noun, feminine; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; agrees with 'Familie' and denotes arrival.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the event.
Preposition introducing 'Besuch'; part of the fixed expression 'zu Besuch' (on a visit).
Noun governed by 'zu'; completes the idiomatic phrase 'zu Besuch'.

sentences.target: Wir essen heute mit der Familie.

translations.de: Wir essen heute mit der Familie.
translations.en: We are eating with the family today.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我们和家人一起吃饭。
translations.yue: 我哋今日同屋企人一齊食飯。
translations.pt: Hoje vamos comer com a família.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi ăn cùng gia đình.
translations.nl: Vandaag eten we met de familie.
translations.hi: आज हम परिवार के साथ खाना खाएँगे.
translations.nb: I dag spiser vi med familien.
translations.id: Hari ini kami makan bersama keluarga.
translations.da: I dag spiser vi med familien.
translations.ja: 今日は家族と一緒に食べます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, 1st person plural present; denotes the action.
Temporal adverb indicating when the action takes place.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces the comitative phrase.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner for 'Familie' after 'mit'.
Noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'mit' in dative case, indicating company.

sentences.target: Er zeigt ein Foto von seiner Familie.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ tsaɪ̯kt aɪ̯n ˈfoːto fɔn ˈzaɪ̯nɐ faˈmiːli̯ə./

translations.de: Er zeigt ein Foto von seiner Familie.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ tsaɪ̯kt aɪ̯n ˈfoːto fɔn ˈzaɪ̯nɐ faˈmiːli̯ə./
translations.en: He shows a photo of his family.
translations.es: Él enseña una foto de su familia.
translations.fr: Il montre une photo de sa famille.
translations.it: Lui mostra una foto della sua famiglia.
translations.zh-Hans: 他展示一张他的家庭照片。
translations.yue: 佢畀人睇佢屋企人嘅相。
translations.pt: Ele mostra uma foto da família dele.
translations.he: הוא מראה תמונה של המשפחה שלו.
translations.vi: Anh ấy cho xem một bức ảnh gia đình của mình.
translations.nl: Hij laat een foto van zijn familie zien.
translations.hi: वह अपने परिवार की एक फोटो दिखाता है.
translations.el: Δείχνει μια φωτογραφία της οικογένειάς του.
translations.nb: Han viser et bilde av familien sin.
translations.sv: Han visar ett foto på sin familj.
translations.ro: El arată o fotografie cu familia lui.
translations.da: Han viser et billede af sin familie.
translations.ja: 彼は家族の写真を見せます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine nominative; subject.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; denotes the act of showing.
Indefinite article; determiner for 'Foto', accusative/neuter in this context.
Common noun, neuter; direct object of 'zeigt'.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces a genitive-like relation ('of').
Possessive determiner, dative feminine singular; modifies 'Familie' after 'von'.
Noun, feminine; object of 'von' in dative case.

sentences.target: Ich rufe meine Familie heute an.

translations.de: Ich rufe meine Familie heute an.
translations.en: I am calling my family today.
translations.yue: 我今日打電話畀屋企人。
translations.pt: Hoje eu ligo para a minha família.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi gọi cho gia đình tôi.
translations.hi: आज मैं अपने परिवार को फोन कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: I dag ringer jeg til familien min.
translations.id: Hari ini saya menelepon keluarga saya.
translations.da: I dag ringer jeg til min familie.
translations.ja: 今日は家族に電話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Main verb, 1st person singular present; part of the separable verb 'anrufen' (to call by phone).
Possessive determiner, accusative feminine singular; modifies 'Familie' as the direct object.
Noun, feminine; direct object in accusative case.
Temporal adverb specifying when the calling happens.
Separable verb particle forming 'anrufen'; placed sentence-final in main clause word order.
